> ⚠️ **Heavy folder (2060 files, 126.7MB).** Most of the bulk is raw/re-fetchable cache — do NOT `grep`/`ls -R`/read it to understand the data. Read the table below and the derived parquet instead.

| Dataset | Size | Status | Producer | What it is |
|---|--:|---|---|---|
| **StatsBomb events** | 3.0MB | LIVE | `ingest/statsbomb.py` | turnovers, lineups, player/team season; narrow elite coverage |
| **StatsBomb La Liga/Ronaldo** | 2.0MB | FROZEN | `ingest/statsbomb_laliga.py` | shot pulls for validation |
| **StatsBomb event cache (raw)** 🗑️raw | 121.7MB | FROZEN | `ingest/statsbomb.py` | ~120MB raw event/360/lineup JSON caches from open-data |
